questions.question: What is the difference between a process and a thread in an operating system?
questions.hint: Explain the key characteristics of both

questions.question: Describe the process of context switching in an operating system. What are the overheads associated with it?
questions.hint: Include the steps involved in context switching and its impact on system performance

questions.question: What is the difference between a priority inversion and a deadlock in an operating system? Provide an example of each scenario.
questions.hint: Explain the underlying causes and consequences of both
